heading: COST
operative_text: (a) The total cost of credit is the amount of the district's maintenance and operations tax revenue that exceeds the level established under Section 48.257. (b) For purposes of this section, a school district's maintenance and operations tax revenue does not include any amounts paid into a tax increment fund under Chapter 311, Tax Code. (c) The cost of attendance credit for a school district is computed using the final tax collections of the district.

defined_terms.definition_excerpt: the amount of the district's maintenance and operations tax revenue that exceeds the level established under Section 48.257

_note: Subsections (a-2) through (a-5) referenced in session law notes are not present in the provided text, indicating possible truncation or prior expiration. Only operative text from subsections (a), (b), and (c) extracted.
